title: Plan Approval
description: Approval artifact for a plan candidate, recording the reviewer decision, rationale, and any surviving non-blocking concerns.

candidate_packet_digest.description: SHA256 digest of the candidate packet under review

candidate_boundary_identifier.description: Identifier for the candidate boundary (e.g. plan filename or release tag)

plan_revision.description: Revision number of the plan being approved

reviewer_set.description: List of reviewers and their dispositions

surviving_non_blocking_concerns.description: Concerns acknowledged but not blocking approval

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the approval was issued
